# The 1 to 500 Game

> Free browser puzzle: ten random integers from 1-500, placed in strict ascending order in ten slots. One invalid confirm ends the run. Installable PWA; works offline.

## Summary
- **What:** Single-player ordering puzzle (numbers 1-500, 10 rounds per run).
- **How:** Preview a draw in an empty slot, then confirm to lock. Order must stay strictly increasing top to bottom.
- **Win:** All ten slots filled validly. **Loss:** Invalid confirm or unwinnable draw.
- **Tech:** Static site + JavaScript; Progressive Web App.

## Primary URL
https://delit.github.io/500/

## Optional
- High score / stats are stored locally (device only).
- Settings include sound, auto play again, and optional one-tap lock (ignore confirm).
